name: Agentic RAG
description: Bridge plugin that exposes confidence-gated Python RAG as an OpenClaw tool.

pythonBin.description: Python binary used to execute the bridge script.

workingDir.description: Optional plugin-relative working directory for bridge execution.

retrievalMode.description: Retrieval mode for Python core. Use hybrid to enable lexical+semantic fusion.

embeddingBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible embeddings base URL, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1.

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model id used by embedding endpoint.

hybridLexicalWeight.description: Weight of lexical score in hybrid fusion. Semantic weight is (1 - lexical).

hybridMinLexicalScore.description: Optional lexical floor for hybrid hits. Semantic-only matches below this lexical score are dropped.

corpusPath.description: Path to retrieval source (JSON corpus file or folder with txt/md/pdf/odt files).
